Curriculum ← Chapter 8

Chapter 8: Knowledge Check

10 questions • ~10 minutes

Question 1 of 10
What happens when customers ask AI "Should I renew with [vendor]?"
Question 2 of 10
Why must value surfacing be "always-on" rather than campaign-driven?
Question 3 of 10
What's the problem with traditional case studies as PDFs behind forms?
Question 4 of 10
Which of these is an expansion signal AI can detect?
Question 5 of 10
What makes a case study "AI-era" rather than "traditional"?
Question 6 of 10
What's the "advocacy loop" in the AI era?
Question 7 of 10
What type of content should usage dashboards provide?
Question 8 of 10
Why are renewals "contested by default" in the AI era?
Question 9 of 10
What markup should you use on customer story pages?
Question 10 of 10
What happens "if your customer can't tell their AI what value you've delivered"?
0/10
Great job!
You passed the Chapter 8 quiz.
